author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint V.2 scope for #933 — extend conformance_vision_models.rs with seeded logit-parity tests for swin_tiny. Approach: (1) extend fixtures_v_parity.json with swin_t reference logits captured via manual_seed=42, (2) add test fn swin_tiny_logit_parity_seeded with F32_MATMUL=1e-3 tolerance, (3) verify output shape and finite values. BEFORE: tests exist with shape/finite/param-count checks but no logit comparison. AFTER: full parity check against pinned torchvision 0.21 reference.
